title: Synchronisation of system clocks to NTP server of NIC or NPL
notes: Inherits AWS GovCloud chrony; India region uses NIC NTP per CERT-In Directions 2022.

title: Reporting of cyber security incidents to CERT-In within 6 hours
notes: 6-hour notification path required for India region. Implementation in TASK-P6-COMP-002.

title: Designation of Point of Contact for CERT-In
notes: Named POC; contact published before India region cutover.

title: Maintenance of logs for a rolling period of 180 days within Indian jurisdiction
notes: Audit + system logs retained 180+ days within ap-south-1. Already covered by 5-year audit retention; geo-pinning enforced by region overlay.

title: Maintenance of validated Know Your Customer (KYC) and financial transaction logs by VPSP/CSP/Crypto exchanges
notes: Chetana is not a VPSP/CSP/crypto exchange. Recorded as N/A.

title: Subscriber/customer registration details for VPN service providers
notes: Chetana is not a VPN provider.

notes: Chetana is not a VASP/cryptographic service.
